CVE-2008-5373.title: mtx-changer.Adic-Scalar-24 in bacula-common 2.4.2 allows local us ...
CVE-2008-5373.description: mtx-changer.Adic-Scalar-24 in bacula-common 2.4.2 allows local users to overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack on a /tmp/mtx.##### temporary file, probably a related issue to CVE-2005-2995.

CVE-2012-4430.title: The dump_resource function in dird/dird_conf.c in Bacula before 5 ...
CVE-2012-4430.description: The dump_resource function in dird/dird_conf.c in Bacula before 5.2.11 does not properly enforce ACL rules, which allows remote authenticated users to obtain resource dump information via unspecified vectors.
